# Mapa desde HDP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->

## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/hotel/es/soho-boutique-opera_madrid
2. Click on "Mostrar en el mapa"
3. Click on Filtros Precio total (€) filter
